headline: Craig Bellamy
body: Wales manager Craig Bellamy in talks with Burnley over joining Championship club. Discussions over contract ongoing but have advanced in last 48 hours. bbc.co.uk/sport/football/art… Link Wales boss Craig Bellamy in talks over Burnley job Burnley hope to complete a deal to appoint Wales boss Craig Bellamy following Scott Parker's departure. bbc.co.uk
